description: ElementStore rom: namespace — platform-specific classes for ROM/arcade translation and migration. Links to game: namespace classes to map legacy hardware data onto universal game structure.

classes.name: Platform
classes.description: Hardware platform definition. Describes the original machine: CPU, video chip, sound chip, memory layout, capabilities. Used to configure the translation pipeline.

props.label: Video Chip
props.description: VIC-II, PPU, VDP, custom, etc.

props.label: Sound Chip
props.description: SID, APU, AY-3-8910, YM2612, OPL2, etc.

props.label: Total Colors
props.description: Hardware palette size (C64=16, NES=64, etc.)

props.label: Max Sprites
props.description: Hardware sprite limit (C64=8, NES=64, etc.)

props.label: Sprite Size
props.description: {width, height} in pixels per hardware sprite

props.label: Tile Size
props.description: {width, height} background tile dimensions

props.label: Address Space
props.description: Total addressable memory in bytes (C64=65536)

props.label: Pixel Aspect Ratio
props.description: Non-square pixels: C64 PAL ~0.936

classes.name: Memory Map
classes.description: Hardware memory layout for a specific ROM. Maps address ranges to functions: code, data, screen RAM, color RAM, sprites, charset, I/O registers, bank switching.

props.label: Regions
props.description: Array of {name, start, end, type, bank, description}. Type: code, data, screen, color, sprite, charset, io, zeropage

props.label: Bank Config
props.description: Bank switching configuration (VIC banks, NES mapper, etc.)

props.label: Zero Page / Fast RAM
props.description: Array of {address, name, size, indexed_by, description}. Fast-access game state variables.

classes.name: ROM Source
classes.description: The original ROM or disk image being translated. Links to platform, memory map, and the target game: objects being built from it.

props.label: Target Game
props.description: The game: object this ROM translates into

props.label: ROM File
props.description: Path to original ROM/disk image

props.label: ROM Size
props.description: File size in bytes

props.label: Disassembly File
props.description: Path to annotated disassembly

classes.name: Data Table
classes.description: ROM lookup/data table. Pre-computed values from the original code: sprite mappings, level pointers, sine tables, behavior flags. Preserves exact ROM data for faithful translation.

props.label: Address
props.description: Start address in ROM (e.g. $47A0)

props.label: Data
props.description: Array of values (bytes, words, or pointers)

props.label: Entry Size
props.description: Bytes per entry (1=byte, 2=word/pointer)

props.label: Purpose
props.description: What routine uses this table and how

props.label: Indexed By
props.description: What variable indexes into this table

props.label: Maps To
props.description: Which game: class property this table feeds into

classes.name: Routine
classes.description: A subroutine from the original ROM code. Documents the entry point, purpose, inputs/outputs, and maps it to the corresponding game: system or handler.

props.label: Entry Address
props.description: Start address (e.g. $0C60)

props.label: Purpose
props.description: What this routine does

props.label: Inputs
props.description: Array of {register_or_address, description}. What the routine reads.

props.label: Outputs
props.description: Array of {register_or_address, description}. What the routine writes.

props.label: Calls
props.description: Other routine addresses/IDs this routine calls (JSR targets)

props.label: Maps To
props.description: Which game_loop phase or game: handler this translates to

props.label: JS Function
props.description: Name of the translated JavaScript function

classes.name: Raw Sprite Data
classes.description: Original sprite bitmap data extracted from ROM. Raw bytes in hardware format. Links to the game:sprite_def it gets converted into.

props.label: Block Index
props.description: Sprite block number in hardware memory

props.label: Address
props.description: Memory address of sprite data

props.label: Raw Bytes
props.description: Base64-encoded original hardware bytes

props.label: Pixel Text
props.description: Human-readable pixel art (#=set, .=clear)

props.label: Maps To
props.description: The game: sprite this converts to

classes.name: Raw Charset Data
classes.description: Original character set / tileset extracted from ROM in hardware format. Links to the game:charset it gets converted into.

props.label: Address
props.description: Memory address of charset data

props.label: Raw Bytes
props.description: Base64-encoded original hardware bytes

props.label: Maps To
props.description: The game: charset this converts to

classes.name: Raw Room Data
classes.description: Original room/level data from ROM in compressed or hardware format. Includes RLE data, color bytes, and any platform-specific encoding. Links to game:scene and game:tile_map.

props.label: Data Address
props.description: Pointer to compressed room data in ROM

props.label: Compressed Data
props.description: Base64-encoded original compressed bytes

props.label: Color Byte
props.description: Platform-specific per-room color value

props.label: Header Data
props.description: Base64-encoded room header/config bytes

classes.name: Character Map
classes.description: Maps a ROM character's hardware state variables to a game:character. Documents which ZP addresses, sprite pairs, and behavior flags correspond to which game properties.

props.label: Hardware Index
props.description: Character index in ZP arrays (0=Bruce, 1=Yamo, 2=Ninja)

props.label: Variable Map
props.description: Maps HW addresses to game: property names: {"$9E": "pos_x", "$A1": "pos_y", ...}

props.label: HW Sprite IDs
props.description: Hardware sprite numbers used by this character

props.label: Initial Values
props.description: State values at game start from ROM: {state_flags, anim_frame, direction, health, ...}

classes.name: Migration Task
classes.description: Tracks the translation progress of a specific ROM component. Links the rom: source object to the game: target object with status and notes.

props.label: Source Object
props.description: ID of the rom: object being translated

props.label: Target Object
props.description: ID of the game: object being produced

props.label: Notes
props.description: Translation notes, issues, decisions

props.label: Accuracy
props.description: How faithfully the translation matches the original

seed.description: ROM source data and migration tracking instances
